subTitle: Central Technical Control Panel | Tenant:
ingestorDesc: Import JSON or CSV files seamlessly with automated field sanitization.
examsDesc: Configure timings, non-linear navigation, penalties, and weights.
questionsDesc: View, edit, and manage the historical versioning of individual questions with immutability controls.
conexionCentralDesc: Integrated console. Operations executed in this portal are permanently recorded in the Tenant\u0027s audit chain.
gradingDesc: Manual correction of attempts, point scoring, and student feedback.
remediationIdsSubtitle: Detected {count} questions with hierarchy conflicts (invalid space/course IDs).
remediationIdsCourseNotInSpace: Course «{course}» does not belong to Space «{space}» or the course does not exist.
remediationIdsSpaceInactive: Space «{space}» is inactive or does not exist.
remediationIdsNoSpace: The question has no Space assigned.
remediationIdsNoCourse: The question has no Course assigned.
remediationIdsNullifyDesc: Remove the Course reference and promote the questions to the selected Space only.
remediationIdsRemember: Remember decision for the rest of the batch
remediationIdsRememberDesc: Apply the same resolution to all questions with the same hierarchy conflict in this batch.
remediationIdsNoCourses: No active Courses in this Space.
remediationIdsResolvedCount: {count, plural, one {# conflict resolved} other {# conflicts resolved}}
selectContextSubtitle: The imported file does not contain Space/Course IDs. {count} question(s) need assignment.
selectContextDesc: Select the Space and optionally the Course that all questions in this batch will belong to.
selectContextNoCourses: No active Courses in this Space.
selectContextSkipDesc: Ingest the questions without Space or Course. They can be manually assigned later.
remediationConflictsSubtitle: Detected {count} potential conflicts between questions in the batch.
remediationConflictsLevel2Desc: Both questions have the same normalized prompt but different options or correct answer.
remediationConflictsLevel3Desc: These questions have very similar prompts (similarity: {score}%).
remediationConflictsResolvedCount: {count, plural, one {# conflict resolved} other {# conflicts resolved}}
remediationSubtitle: Detected {count} of {total} questions with incomplete metadata (Module, Source or Difficulty). How do you want to proceed?
remedOption1Desc: Provide a module, source or difficulty value and apply it to all incomplete questions.
remedOption2Desc: Visualize the prompts and manually enter the missing fields sequentially.
remedOption3Desc: Ingest the corpus without remediating. The system will fill with generic defaults.
bulkRemedDesc: Define the values to inject into all incomplete questions in this import batch.
adminDescriptionFull: Federated control console and hot governance for tenant <tenant>{tenantId}</tenant>.
promptsDesc: Configure and manage AI prompt templates for the automatic tutor.
liveLogsDesc: New audit logs will appear here in real time.
soc2ReportDesc: Generate a cryptographically signed PDF with your audit log history and SHA-256 integrity chain.
leadsDesc: Review and approve pending organization registration requests.
